since_last: 60% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +6.42%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.02% · BTC +0.08% · Gold +1.31% · Nasdaq100 -1.07%. 60% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +6.42%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +6.42%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.30%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NOW is the standout at +9.63%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +9.63%, DV +9.35%, WDAY +9.07%, DDOG +8.83%, SNOW +8.63%. Laggards: QCOM -8.31%, NXPI -7.31%, TER -7.22%, HPE -6.77%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.17% at $154.79
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.17% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
